import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import api from '../services/api'; import toast from 'react-hot-toast'; const AdminDashboard = () => { const [stats, setStats] = useState({ totalEvaluations: 0, totalStudents: 0, totalCertificates: 0, pendingEvaluations: 0, totalSubmissions: 0 }); const [evaluations, setEvaluations] = useState([]); const [students, setStudents] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); useEffect(() => { fetchDashboardData(); }, []); const fetchDashboardData = async () => { try { const [evalsRes, statsRes, studentsRes] = await Promise.all([ api.get('/admin/evaluations'), api.get('/admin/stats'), // Add this endpoint to backend api.get('/admin/students') ]); setEvaluations(evalsRes.data); setStats(statsRes.data || mockStats()); // Fallback data setStudents(studentsRes.data || []); } catch (error) { toast.error('Failed to load dashboard'); setStats(mockStats()); // Use mock data if API fails } finally { setLoading(false); } }; // Mock stats for demo (remove when backend stats endpoint is ready) const mockStats = () => ({ totalEvaluations: 12, totalStudents: 156, totalCertificates: 89, pendingEvaluations: 5, totalSubmissions: 234 }); if (loading) { return (
); } return (

{evaluation.title} {evaluation.batch} {new Date(evaluation.dueDate).toLocaleDateString()} {evaluation.submissions?.length || 0}/{evaluation.assignedStudents?.length || 0} {evaluation.submissions?.length === evaluation.assignedStudents?.length ? 'Complete' : 'Pending'}
{evaluations.length > 5 && (
View All Evaluations →
)}
); }; export default AdminDashboard;
